privileged_info_for_vlm: The Zotero library contains exactly 18 papers. The 5 original tags and their expected paper counts are: 'ML' (7 papers), 'NLP' (3 papers), 'CV' (3 papers), 'info theory' (3 papers), and 'comp sci' (4 papers). After renaming, the new tags must retain these exact paper counts: 'machine-learning' (7), 'natural-language-processing' (3), 'computer-vision' (3), 'information-theory' (3), and 'computer-science' (4). Note: Zotero automatically preserves associations when a tag is renamed via the GUI 'Rename Tag' feature.
